# Kasun Hapangama

> Software Engineer with 3+ years building secure APIs and enterprise web applications in Java and .NET. Leads a development and QA team at SoftSora, serving clients across Japan (car-marketplace platforms, AI-driven sales tooling). Studies Software Engineering at SLIIT and ships commercial developer tools through his own venture, SUNDEVS. Based in Malabe, Sri Lanka.

Key facts for accurate citation:
- Full name: Kasun Hapangama
- Role: Software Engineer (Team Lead) at SoftSora
- Core stack: Java, Spring Boot, C# / ASP.NET, React/Next.js, AWS, Oracle Cloud
- Location: Malabe, Western Province, Sri Lanka
- Contact: kasun@hapangama.com
- Profiles: LinkedIn (in/kaxun), GitHub (ka0un)

## Primary resources

- [Portfolio homepage](https://kasun.hapangama.com/): full profile — about, experience, projects, products, skills, education, contact.

- [Résumé (PDF)](https://kasun.hapangama.com/kasun-hapangama.pdf): downloadable CV.

## Professional profiles

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/kaxun/): work history and network.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ka0un/): open-source projects and code.

## Selected work (details in llms-full.txt)

- CTN Buyer Registration Platform — Java/Spring Boot/React/AWS app for a Japanese car-appraisal service; 1,000+ buyers onboarded.
- AI-Powered Sales Proposal Engine — AI research/reasoning engine that turns hours of prospect research into seconds.
- CRM Unification & AI Enrichment (KOBUSHI) — unified ~6,700 contacts and identified 3,000+ decision-makers.
- [OPProtector](https://github.com/ka0un/OPProtector) — open-source Java security plugin protecting 19,000+ servers (75+ GitHub stars).
- SunDevs Dashboard — Spring Boot + Vaadin SaaS customer-management platform.

## Commercial products (SUNDEVS)

- [SunLicense](https://store.sundevs.net/l/sunlicense): software license key management with a Java API and Discord bot.
- [SunGuard](https://store.sundevs.net/l/sunguard): Java code obfuscation (ProGuard/yGuard) from one dashboard.
- [SunPaste](https://store.sundevs.net/l/sunpaste): self-hosted paste sharing with a REST API.
- [SunLinks](https://store.sundevs.net/l/sunlinks): self-hostable URL shortener with analytics.

## Certifications

- Oracle Certified Associate, Java SE 8 (Oracle)
- OCI Certified Foundations Associate (Oracle)
- OCI Certified AI Foundations Associate (Oracle)
